_comment: Hand-researched official nutrition for PACKAGED/BRANDED park items, where the park sells the exact packaged product so the official label is correct (unlike made-in-park items, whose portion differs from any published serving). Each entry cites its source. Importer: scripts/import-researched-nutrition.ts. Only fields actually verified are listed; the importer leaves unlisted fields untouched. Confidence 80 = packaged official label (minor cross-source vari/serving rounding).

entries.label: Mickey's Premium Ice Cream Bar (Nestlé, vanilla, chocolate-coated)
entries.note: Packaged Nestlé product; official label. Excludes hand-dipped (larger, made in-park) and sandwich.

entries.label: Mickey's Premium Ice Cream Sandwich (Nestlé, vanilla)
entries.note: Packaged Nestlé product; vanilla official label.

entries.label: Mickey's Premium Cookies 'n Cream Ice Cream Sandwich (Nestlé)
entries.note: Packaged Nestlé product; cookies 'n cream variant official label.
